scope: DM1/V1 ReDMCSB source contract for open-chest action-hand icon refresh while the inventory panel is open; worker-only evidence gate, not a V2 art lane.

sourceRanges.assertion: Inventory champion action-hand object icons are adjusted after F0033_OBJECT_GetIconIndex; closed chest icon C144 is incremented to open chest C145 for BUG0_35.
Opening a chest records G0426_T_OpenChest and, unless opened via eye press, draws C145_ICON_CONTAINER_CHEST_OPEN into C09_SLOT_BOX_INVENTORY_ACTION_HAND.
Adding a container chest to the inventory champion action hand marks MASK0x0800_PANEL for panel/action-hand refresh semantics.
Firestaff's current occupied inventory slot helper resolves a DM object icon index before drawing; this gate does not claim open-chest state mutation is implemented.
Firestaff's normal V1 inventory overlay draws source-slot object icons, providing the narrow implementation seam for the ReDMCSB action-hand open-chest refresh rule.

nonClaims: Does not implement or prove Firestaff runtime open-chest state mutation or click behavior.
Does not validate V2 inventory art, V2 asset manifests, CSB utility member locks, or pass162/C080 delivery.
Does not use DANNESBURK; source paths are ReDMCSB and Firestaff N2 only.
